data.title: Bitget Onchain Trading (Onchain) launched projects DB, ethard, memecoin
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Bitget's on-chain transactions (Onchain) have launched projects such as DB, ethard, memecoin, CYBERWISH, FAIR3, and jobcoin. Users can start transactions by entering the on-chain transaction section on the App interface.

data.title: BNB Chain: PumpBTC received $280,000 in liquidity rewards, and the second batch of liquidity incentive plan has been completed
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News BNB Chain announced that the second batch of its $100 million liquidity incentive plan has been successfully completed. PumpBTC (PUMP) received a liquidity reward of up to $280,000. 
Earlier news, the second batch of selected projects for the BNB Chain $100 million liquidity incentive plan was PumpBTC.

data.title: Binance, KuCoin, MEXC report service issues due to AWS network interruption
data.description:
Binance, KuCoin, MEXC and other exchanges and wallet providers are experiencing service issues due to a significant network interruption by Amazon Web Services (AWS). Centralized cryptocurrency exchanges (CEXs) have been hit by an AWS data center outage, which reported “connectivity issues” that affected at least 12 of its services on April 15. AWS Service health
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/binance-kucoin-mexc-aws-outage-crypto-service-issues?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Bitget PoolX and CandyBomb will soon list WCT
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Bitget PoolX is about to launch the WCT project, with a total prize pool of 150,000 WCT. The lock-up channel is open from 19:00 on April 15 to 19:00 on April 22 (UTC+8), details are as follows:
WCT lock-up pool:
Total airdrop: 150,000 WCT
Personal lock-up limit: 2,500,000 WCT
In addition, you can participate in the CandyBomb special event, top up and share 650,000 WCT, the event is open from 19:00 on April 15 to 19:00 on April 22 (UTC+8). The WCT on-chain coin earning product will be launched at 18:00 on April 17 (UTC+8), with a yield of 4.78% APR.

data.title: MGBX will launch KERNEL/USDT contract trading
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, MGBX will officially launch KERNEL/USDT contract trading at 18:00 (SGT) on April 15.

data.title: DoraHacks officially launches BUIDL AI, opening automated payment service for hackathons
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: BUIDL AI, the core AI management system of the open source and open innovation platform DoraHacks, is officially launched, automating the entire process of hackathon organization: project scoring, review and approval, smart reminders, one-click summary generation, multi-hackathon management and other core modules are all automatically completed by BUIDL AI. From now on, partner organizations and developers can try and subscribe to these services through the new unified management background. Multiple core ecological organizations and Web3 infrastructure platforms are piloting the use of BUIDL AI to provide continuous incentives for their communities and developers.
BUIDL AI is a key step for DoraHacks, the world's largest hacker sports platform, to move towards a fully automated developer community and hackathon.

data.title: Binance: All Services Are Gradually Recovering, Withdrawals Have Reopened
data.description: Binance’s official X account announced that all services are starting to recover and resume. Withdrawals have also reopened. Please note that some services might experience delays while the system fully recovers. The team will continue to monitor to ensure that all operations run smoothly. Earlier, Binance’s official account posted on X that a temporary network interruption in the AWS data center had affected some services on the Binance platform. The team has been working closely with AWS to resolve the issue as quickly as possible and will continue to provide updates. As a precaution, Binance temporarily suspended withdrawal services to keep safe.

data.title: Stablecoin Inflows Indicate Growth in Crypto Ecosystem
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Matrixport's recent daily chart analysis highlights that despite a slowdown in growth, stablecoin inflows continue steadily, indicating ongoing development within the crypto ecosystem. While this influx is not sufficient to trigger a significant altcoin rally, it clearly shows that the industry is far from stagnant.

Notably, the increase in stablecoin inflows persists even amid uncertainties in the stock and bond markets, suggesting that crypto assets are gradually evolving into a more non-correlated asset class.

As debates over tariffs and trade wars intensify, the potential applications of cryptocurrencies become increasingly appealing, offering a slightly optimistic outlook for the market's future.

data.title: DeBank Services Temporarily Unavailable Due to AWS Outage
data.description: According to Foresight News, DeBank has announced that all its services are temporarily unavailable due to an outage in AWS services. The DeBank team is actively monitoring the situation and working to restore access as soon as possible.

data.title: Binance: All services are gradually being restored, and the withdrawal function has also been reopened
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Binance official posted on the X platform: "All services are gradually recovering and going back online, and the withdrawal function has also been reopened. Please note that some services may still be delayed during the full recovery of the system. We will continue to monitor to ensure that all operations proceed smoothly."
